caribbean.headline: Heavy Rain and Choppy Seas Impact Grand Cayman Today
caribbean.paragraph: Grand Cayman is experiencing moderate winds up to 19 kt with wave heights reaching 6.8 ft and a dominant southeast swell period of 7 seconds. Showers are likely with a 54% rain probability, creating challenging conditions for marine and port operations, while St. Thomas faces slightly stronger winds at 24 kt but lower wave heights.

mediterranean.headline: Calm Conditions Persist Across Mediterranean Ports Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Cadiz is experiencing light westerly winds at 12 kt with wave heights reaching 4.0 ft and a swell period of 11 seconds. Rain probability remains less than 10% with no significant weather impacts expected, while Mykonos sees slightly stronger winds at 19 kt but similarly stable conditions.
